signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Deadline Looms April 25, Banks Push Back | YES | LOW confidence**  
Senate committee faces Friday deadline for CLARITY Act markup ahead of April 27 vote week, with banks threatening opposition amid regulatory uncertainty; could enable direct XRP bank liquidity.[1][6] No resolutions yet, but timing aligns with Fed meeting and SEC roundtable later in April.[1]
